Interface KineticWeapon.Builder

All Superinterfaces:
DataComponentBuilder<KineticWeapon>
Enclosing interface:
KineticWeapon
@Experimental @NonExtendable public static interface KineticWeapon.Builder extends DataComponentBuilder<KineticWeapon>
Builder for KineticWeapon.
